response.overview: After a devastating tragedy changes his life forever, a once driven and successful man shuts himself away from the world, pushing away anyone who tries to get close. Determined to live with his pain alone, he builds walls no one seems able to break.  But when a young woman unexpectedly enters his life for what was supposed to be just a job, everything begins to shift. Her presence challenges his silence, unsettles his guarded world, and slowly awakens emotions he thought were long buried. Yet some pasts refuse to stay hidden, and facing them may change both their lives in ways neither of them ever imagined.
response.title: Wheels of the Heart
